message:
test(ftui-harness): add 12 terminal model property tests

Verifies TerminalModel structural invariants: crash resistance on
arbitrary input, cursor bounds, dimension matching, determinism,
empty feed noop, printable cursor advance, SGR reset, CUP positioning,
chunked feeding equivalence, row_text bounds, char_at safety, and
erase line correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
